action_functional.composition_law: compose operators in packet_archive_tensor_frame_pair_region bases, then remeasure interaction terms instead of assuming independent delta additivity
action_functional.operator_semantics: each materializer is an operator T with receiver R_T; evaluate S(T)=delta_segnet(R_T(T(a)))+delta_posenet(R_T(T(a)))+lambda_rate*delta_archive_bytes(T(a))

waterfill_solver.rebrotli_policy: after every receiver-consumed rate transform, enqueue packet_member_recompress_v1 or section Brotli retune where the runtime proof keeps payload semantics fixed

scheduler_actions.purpose: bind portfolio materializer contexts across packet_archive_tensor_targets

scheduler_actions.advisory_reason: bridge intent only until a concrete many-op candidate archive and exact-readiness artifact exist
